collections.name: Heritage Farm at Sea Pines

location.address: 175 Greenwood Dr, Hilton Head Island, SC 29928

collections.description: A community garden in the heart of Sea Pines. Heritage Farm gardeners grow more food than they can eat — this page lets you buy the surplus directly from the people whose beds are steps from this sign.
